title: bivolva involucrata
intro: Bivolva involucrata, also known as the "Wild Bivolva" or "Involucrate Bivolva", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Bivolva. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. The leaves and roots of the plant are used to prepare herbal remedies that can help to relieve symptoms of indigestion, bloating, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as to alleviate fever and reduce pain. Bivolva involucrata is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
